title: corchorus pumilio
intro: Corchorus pumilio, also known as the small jute or dwarf jute, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Corchorus pumilio include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Corchorus pumilio can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
